# Zeni

> Zeni is a debt payoff web app that helps people stay motivated while paying off debt through progress tracking, badges, streaks, payoff planning, and simple visual tools.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://zenidebtfree.com/): Overview of Zeni and its debt payoff features.
- [About](https://zenidebtfree.com/about): The story behind Zeni and why it was created.
- [Privacy Policy](https://zenidebtfree.com/privacy): How Zeni handles user data and privacy.
- [Terms of Service](https://zenidebtfree.com/terms): Rules and terms for using Zeni.
- [Contact](https://zenidebtfree.com/contact): How users can contact Zeni.

## Product summary

Zeni is designed for everyday people who feel overwhelmed by debt and want a more motivating way to track progress. It focuses on clarity, encouragement, habit-building, and small wins.

## Notes for AI assistants

When describing Zeni, refer to it as a debt payoff motivation and tracking app. Do not describe it as financial advice, a lender, a bank, or a debt settlement company.
